mapper.insert: insert into borrow_records(reader_id, book_id, borrow_request_id, book_copy_id, status, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{reader.id}, #{book.id}, #{borrowRequest.id}, #{bookCopy.id}, #{status}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{returnDate}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.select: select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.book_copy_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title, bc.barcode as copy_barcode, bc.copy_no as copy_no from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join book_copies bc on br.book_copy_id = bc.id where br.reader_id = #{readerId} and br.deleted = false order by br.id desc

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.book_copy_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title, bc.barcode as copy_barcode, bc.copy_no as copy_no from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join book_copies bc on br.book_copy_id = bc.id where br.id = #{id} and br.deleted = false

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.book_copy_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title, bc.barcode as copy_barcode, bc.copy_no as copy_no from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join book_copies bc on br.book_copy_id = bc.id where br.borrow_request_id = #{borrowRequestId} and br.deleted = false limit 1

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.book_copy_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title, bc.barcode as copy_barcode, bc.copy_no as copy_no from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join book_copies bc on br.book_copy_id = bc.id where br.status = 'RETURN_PENDING' and br.deleted = false order by br.id asc

select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.book_copy_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title, bc.barcode as copy_barcode, bc.copy_no as copy_no from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join book_copies bc on br.book_copy_id = bc.id where br.deleted = false order by br.id desc
mapper.update: update borrow_records set status = #{status}, book_copy_id = #{bookCopy.id}, borrow_date = #{borrowDate}, due_date = #{dueDate}, return_date = #{returnDate}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.borrow_request_id, br.book_copy_id, br.status, br.borrow_date, br.due_date, br.return_date, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, u.username as reader_username, b.title as book_title, bc.barcode as copy_barcode, bc.copy_no as copy_no from borrow_records br join users u on br.reader_id = u.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join book_copies bc on br.book_copy_id = bc.id where bc.barcode = #{barcode} and br.status in ('BORROWED', 'RETURN_PENDING', 'OVERDUE') and br.deleted = false limit 1

SELECT b.id as bookId, b.title, b.author, c.name as categoryName, COUNT(br.id) as borrowCount FROM borrow_records br JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE br.deleted = false GROUP BY b.id, b.title, b.author, c.name ORDER BY borrowCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COALESCE(c.name, 'Uncategorized') as categoryName, COUNT(br.id) as borrowCount FROM borrow_records br JOIN books b ON br.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN categories c ON b.category_id = c.id WHERE br.deleted = false GROUP BY COALESCE(c.name, 'Uncategorized') ORDER BY borrowCount DESC, categoryName ASC LIMIT #{limit}

choose.when: SELECT period, SUM(borrowCount) as borrowCount, SUM(returnCount) as returnCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') as period, COUNT(*) as borrowCount, 0 as returnCount FROM borrow_records WHERE deleted = false AND borrow_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(return_date, '%Y-%m') as period, 0 as borrowCount, COUNT(*) as returnCount FROM borrow_records WHERE deleted = false AND return_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(return_date, '%Y-%m') ) trend_stats GROUP BY period ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 12
choose.otherwise: SELECT period, SUM(borrowCount) as borrowCount, SUM(returnCount) as returnCount FROM ( SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%x-W%v') as period, COUNT(*) as borrowCount, 0 as returnCount FROM borrow_records WHERE deleted = false AND borrow_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%x-W%v') UNION ALL SELECT DATE_FORMAT(return_date, '%x-W%v') as period, 0 as borrowCount, COUNT(*) as returnCount FROM borrow_records WHERE deleted = false AND return_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(return_date, '%x-W%v') ) trend_stats GROUP BY period ORDER BY period DESC LIMIT 12
